language.title: Language
language.hint: Interface language. Documentation uses a separate setting in docs: URLs.

tab.closeAllConfirm: Close all tabs? Pinned tabs will stay open.

settings.openLinksInNewTab: Open sites in a new tab
settings.pageCacheHint: Cached mesh pages load instantly. Disable caching or clear the cache when you need fresh content from the network.
settings.micronHint: JavaScript uses micron-parser-js in the browser. WebAssembly uses micron-parser-go modules you select below. Go uses the server renderer. If WASM is unavailable or fails to load, pages fall back to JavaScript automatically.
settings.wasmUnavailable: WebAssembly is not available in this webview. Only JavaScript and Go renderers can be used.
settings.micronPreserveLayoutHint: Keep fixed-width lines on micron pages. Wide art and menus scroll horizontally instead of wrapping.
settings.keyboardShortcutsDesktopOnly: Keyboard shortcuts are available on desktop builds.
settings.reticulumInterfacesHint: Toggle interfaces configured above or imported from the directory.
settings.noInterfacesDescription: Add Reticulum interfaces in your config file to connect to the mesh.
settings.resetConfirm: Reset appearance, browsing preferences, and keyboard shortcuts to defaults?
settings.shutdownHint: Stop mesh networking and close the app.
settings.shutdownConfirm: Shut down the application? Mesh connections will stop.
settings.resetBrowserHint: Delete all data and configuration, then close the app. Use this for a full factory reset.
settings.resetBrowserConfirm: Delete all browser data, database, and configuration? The app will close and you will need to restart it manually. This cannot be undone.
settings.restartReticulumHint: Restart the entire Reticulum Network Stack (RNS) and all active interfaces.
settings.restartReticulumConfirm: Restart the entire Reticulum Network Stack? This will temporarily disconnect all active mesh connections and interfaces.
settings.sandboxActiveHint: Filesystem access is limited to application data, caches, and system libraries.
settings.sandboxReasonDesktopWebkit: Disabled on the desktop app because WebKitGTK uses a nested process sandbox that conflicts with Landlock.
settings.sandboxReasonUnsupportedKernel: Disabled because this kernel does not support Landlock (Linux 5.13+ required).
settings.sandboxReasonEnvDisabled: Disabled by the REN_BROWSER_LANDLOCK environment variable.
settings.sandboxReasonUnsupportedPlatform: Landlock is only available on Linux.
settings.shareApkHint: Share this app's APK with nearby devices over Wi-Fi or through the Android share sheet.
settings.shareApkScan: Scan this code on another device to download the APK.
settings.shareApkUnavailable: APK sharing is not available on this device.
settings.shareApkShareFailed: Could not open the share sheet
settings.shareApkCopyFailed: Could not copy the download URL

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Browse sites on the mesh network.
discovery.scanning: {app} is scanning the mesh. Sites will appear here when nodes announce themselves.
discovery.noFavoritesDescription: Star a site in Discovery or mark a page as a favorite while browsing.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Pages you visited recently on the mesh.
history.noHistoryDescription: Pages you visit on the mesh will be listed here, grouped by date.
history.clearConfirm: Clear all browsing history? This cannot be undone.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find pages, sites, and favorites across the mesh.
search.noDataDescription: Browse the mesh or favorite sites and they will appear here.
search.noRecentDescription: Pages you visit will show up here for quick access.

devtools.consoleEmptyDescription: Application logs from Reticulum and the browser shell will show up here.
devtools.noNetworkDescription: Mesh page requests and their timing will be recorded here.
devtools.noRawDescription: Open a mesh page to inspect its source bytes here.

downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.noDownloadsDescription: Pages and mesh files you save will appear here.
downloads.noPageToSave: No page is open to save
downloads.noPageContent: Current page has no content to save
downloads.interrupted: Interrupted when the app closed — retry to download again

documents.corruptEpub: This EPUB is incomplete or corrupted. Wait for the download to finish. Open it again from Downloads.
documents.missingData: Document data was not received from the browser

content.emptyDescription: Enter an address in the bar above or open Discovery to browse the mesh.
content.multilineHint: Press Enter again to expand to multi-line

editor.parserWasmUnavailable: WebAssembly parser failed to load; preview uses JavaScript.

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.pickerUnavailable: File picker is only available in the desktop app.
extensions.noExtensionsDescription: Install a .renplugin.zip, a bundled .wasm module, or copy a folder into the plugins directory.
extensions.networkInstallMessage: Install {name} ({id})? This extension can make outbound network requests through RenBrowser.
extensions.installMessage: Install {name} ({id})? Review requested permissions before continuing.
extensions.installPermissionsHint: Disabling permissions can break extension features.
extensions.networkInstallEndpoints: External URLs this extension may contact
extensions.networkInstallEndpointsBlocked: Network access is currently disabled for install. These URLs would be used if you grant network.fetch.
extensions.networkInstallEndpointsUnknown: No external URLs were declared or detected in this extension.
extensions.signatureInvalid: This extension has an invalid signature and cannot be installed.
extensions.badgeTamperedHint: Extension files were modified outside RenBrowser. Re-enable to accept the current files.

permission.navigation.read: Read the current page URL and content

identity.title: Identity
identity.hint: Transport identities control how you appear on the Reticulum mesh. Switching identity changes your hash and may affect existing links.
identity.noIdentitiesDescription: Create a new identity or import an existing transport_identity file.
identity.switchConfirm: Switch to "{name}"? Existing mesh links may need to be re-established.
identity.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? The key file will be removed from this device.
identity.copyFailed: Failed to copy hash to clipboard
identity.duplicate: This identity is already in your registry.
identity.cannotDeleteActive: Switch to another identity before deleting this one.
identity.cannotDeleteLast: At least one identity must remain.
identity.invalidKeyFile: The selected file is not a valid identity key.

setup.title: Welcome to Ren Browser
setup.subtitle: Choose how to connect to the wider Reticulum mesh. You can change interfaces later in Settings.
setup.suggestedHint: We picked {count} community hubs from the public directory.
setup.pickHint: Choose community interfaces to add to your configuration.
setup.configHint: Edit reticulum.conf directly. AutoInterface stays enabled unless you remove it.
setup.autoOnlyHint: Skip community hubs for now. Local peer discovery will still work.
setup.suggestedEmpty: No seedable interfaces were found. Try browsing the directory or editing the config.

community.title: Community interfaces
community.bundledHint: Showing bundled community interfaces because the live directory is unavailable.
community.noInterfacesDescription: Try another search or refresh the directory.

wasm.noSupport: This webview does not support WebAssembly. Micron pages use the JavaScript parser instead.
wasm.noBundled: No bundled micron-parser-go.wasm in this build. Fetch a release below, upload a .wasm file, or run the vendor fetch script to install the default parser and wasm_exec.js.
wasm.storageHint: Custom WASM modules are stored locally. Only install parsers you trust. Failed WASM loads fall back to micron-parser-js automatically.
wasm.loadFailed: Parser failed to load. Micron pages will fall back to JavaScript.
wasm.tagRequired: Enter a release tag (for example v1.0.6).
wasm.removeConfirm: Remove this WASM parser from local storage?

split.title: Split view
split.hint: Choose a tab to show beside the active tab.
split.noOtherTab: Open another tab to split with.

crash.title: Ren Browser hit a rendering error
crash.description: Something went wrong while loading the interface. You can copy debug logs when reporting the issue.

dialog.identifyMessage: Identify yourself to this node? The page will reload afterward.
dialog.resetDbMessage: This permanently deletes saved tabs, history, favorites, and settings. Continue?

errors.connectionFailedDescription: Could not reach this node. Check that Reticulum interfaces are online and the destination is available on the mesh.
errors.connectionLostDescription: The link to the node was interrupted before the page finished loading.
errors.notFoundDescription: This node does not have a page at this address.
errors.payloadTooLargeDescription: This page or file exceeds the configured size limit and was rejected to protect your device.
errors.storageFullDescription: {app} cannot write to disk. Free up space or fix permissions for your profile folder.
errors.databaseCorruptDescription: Your local profile data could not be read. Resetting the database removes saved tabs, history, favorites, and settings.
errors.unknownDescription: Something went wrong while loading this page.
errors.extensionPermissionNotGranted: {plugin} needs {permission}. Enable it in Extensions settings.
errors.extensionNetworkLimit: Extension exceeded the network request limit ({limit} requests).
